title: STM Cursed
description:
This is a texture pack aka resource pack for minecraft mobs
this pack completely change the some mobs and the pack proved you new cursed design and texture
version 1.16 to latest
body:
This i present you Cursed pack.
This is a texture pack aka resource pack for minecraft mobs
this pack completely change the some mobs and the pack proved you new cursed design and texture.
this pack change mobs into funny and cursed texture.

Optifine required
otherwise this pack doesn't work properly.

this pack is created to support all kind of Horror adventure theme minecraft.
and make minecraft more creepy.

changes in minecraft after applying the pack.

changes are:-

1)villager
2)wandering trader
3)wither skeleton
4)iron golem
5)witch
6)pig
7)creeper
8)enderman
9)zombie
10)husk
11)bed
12)trident

Without Optifine you can use this texture pack

Fabric-mods-
1)[EMF] Entity Model Features
2)[ETF] Entity Texture Features
3)Continuity
4)CIT Resewn
5)Indium

Forge-mods-
1)[EMF] Entity Model Features
2)[ETF] Entity Texture Features
3)Connectedness
4)Fusion (Connected Textures)

this pack is good for role play videos
Horror adventure videos

this pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.

 

version supported
form- 1.16 to latest


make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files

 

Enjoy the "Cursed Pack".

 

THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD.
